user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Marshall
Product type: Stanmore III speaker
Tone: bold, vintage, premium
Visual style: A sleek blend of retro rock-and-roll aesthetics with modern minimalist design elements emphasizing high-quality materials and craftsmanship.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling with lifestyle aspiration
Format: image

brief.visual_style: A sleek blend of retro rock-and-roll aesthetics with modern minimalist design elements emphasizing high-quality materials and craftsmanship.

creative_brief.headline: Classic Sound. Modern Power.
creative_brief.subheadline: The Stanmore III — where heritage meets high fidelity.
creative_brief.body_copy: Experience the spirit of legendary rock-and-roll with the Stanmore III speaker. Meticulously crafted with premium materials and cutting-edge technology, it delivers bold, rich sound that commands attention. Designed for those who value authentic style and uncompromising performance.

visual_direction.scene: A dimly lit, stylish loft space with exposed brick walls and vintage music memorabilia. The Stanmore III speaker sits prominently on a polished wood shelf, spotlighted to highlight its textured vinyl finish, brass accents, and iconic Marshall logo.
visual_direction.color_palette: Warm tones of black, gold, and deep brown with subtle highlights to evoke a vintage yet premium feel.
visual_direction.composition: Balanced combination of retro elements (like a vintage guitar, vinyl records) with sleek modern furniture, emphasizing the speaker as the centerpiece.
visual_direction.lighting: Moody, directional lighting that casts gentle shadows, creating depth and a sense of timeless craftsmanship.
visual_direction.typography: Bold serif fonts for headline to convey heritage, paired with clean sans-serif for subheadline and body copy to maintain modernity.
